primary_text:
Here's exactly what you're eating and where it came from.

Beef: Rachel's Farm, Kempsey NSW. 100% grass-fed, pasture-raised, no hormones.

Salmon: Collins Wild Caught, South Coast NSW. Wild-caught, never farmed.

Dairy: Paris Creek Farms, Meadows SA. Biodynamic, carbon-neutral.

Eggs: Farmer Brown, NSW. Pasture-raised.

Every product on FarmThru traces to a named farm. Zero warehouses, zero wholesalers. Farm to hub to your kitchen.

The Brookvale hub is open Monday to Friday.
headline: Here's where your food comes from
description: Named farms, real farmers, full traceability. Collected from the Brookvale hub.
creative_brief: Clean grid of four products, each with a small farm-name label beneath. Editorial food photography. Warm, honest lighting. No styling tricks.
